masteries.name: Falling Flower
passives: On hit after using 10% of Max Mana, drops a flame that deals damage by 210% of Base Damage within a 1m radius around the target. Has a cooldown of 6s.

masteries.name: Indomitable Stance
passives:
Activated when Health remains at 90% or higher for 5s. Upon being hit, activates a shield with Health equal to 120 times your Fortitude for 3s. Cooldown: 60s.

Shares cooldown with the Windy Veil Overall Mastery Skill.

masteries.name: Lightning Speed
passives:
Activated when you move for 10s. On hit, lightning that chains for 3s will deal 40% of your Base Damage. The chain lightning activates max 10 times per sec. If the target is Wet or inflicted by your Frost effect, the lightning will be transferred to other enemies in a 5m radius, up to 2 additional times. Cooldown: 30s.

Does not apply additional effects from lightning.

masteries.name: Time Bomb
passives: Using attack skills stacks Time Bomb on you that lasts for 10s, up to 3 times. Damaging a target using a Control Skill will fire up to 3 time bombs at the target, dealing fixed damage that never fails to hit by 5% of Max Health per stack within a 3m radius around the target. Has a cooldown of 30s.

masteries.name: Battle Prep
passives: On attack or taking damage, increases Base Damage by 3% for 3s and increases all CC Hit Chance by 125. Cooldown: 30s

masteries.name: Guardian's Awakening
passives: During Guardian Morph, increases Dexterity, Fortitude, Perception, Strength, and Wisdom by 4.

masteries.name: Windy Veil
passives:
Upon using a Mobility Skill, activates a Shield with Health equal to 100 times your Perception for 3s. Cooldown: 60s

Shares cooldown with the Indomitable Stance Overall Mastery Skill.

masteries.name: Survival Enhancement
passives: Increases Buff Duration by 25% for 3s upon use of Survival Skills. Cooldown: 30s.

masteries.name: Fighting Instincts
passives: Increases all CC Resistance by 225 for 2s when affected by Bind, Collision, Petrification, Silence, Sleep, or Stun. Cooldown: 30s.

masteries.name: Overcoming Pain
passives: Increases All Heavy Attack Chance and All Critical Hit Chance by 200 for 3s when attacking an enemy within 10s after being affected by Weaken: Burning, Burst, Curse, Ignite, or Poison. Cooldown: 30s

masteries.name: Duelist
passives: Increases PvP damage by 10% when there is only 1 enemy within 4m. For each ally within range, increases PvP damage taken by 4%, up to a maximum of 12%.

masteries.name: Shielded by Unity
passives: Increases max Shield Health Received by 5% for each allied player within 4m, up to a maximum of 15%.

masteries.name: Defense Null
passives:
On hit with a Control or Tactics skill 5 times, decreases target Block Chance by 35% for 6s. Cooldown: 24s.

Inapplicable Skills
Mother Nature's Protest, Umbral Spirit, and Thunder Spirit

masteries.name: Guardian's Blessing
passives: During Guardian Morph, increases all CC Resistance by 200, and restores 40 Health each time you attack a target.

masteries.name: Bloodlust
passives: On attack or taking damage, consumes 12% of Mana to increase Boss Heavy Attack Chance and Boss Critical Hit Chance by 150. Cooldown: 5s

masteries.name: Piercing Spear
passives:
Upon landing 10 hits with attack skills, fires a Destruction Spear at a single target, dealing 600% of Base Damage. Can only gain 1 stack per skill. A 12s reactivation cooldown applies. Ignores the target's Block Chance.

Cannot be used together with Destruction Spear Overall Mastery Skill.

Inapplicable Skills
Mother Nature's Protest, Umbral Spirit, Thunder Spirit, Ray of Disaster
